validation_evidence.result: passed: returned canonical source and 8 scoped targets

leader_review_corrections: Compact install result now summarizes action counts and relative files instead of verbose per-file absolute source/target paths.
Public CLI contract test now includes agent installer error codes.
Installer refuses a non-directory target path even when --force is supplied.
.agents/README.md now points to the cross-platform CLI and scopes PowerShell sync as a repo-local helper.
Quick state corrected to record native subagent execution rather than leader-inline fallback.
recovery_guidance: If a target is refused as divergent, inspect the existing target and rerun with --force only when overwriting source-managed files is intended.
If a future host uses a different skill-root convention, extend the adapter matrix in src/agent-installer.js and add a targeted test.
notes: Tests used explicit temp --target directories and did not mutate real user home/tool directories.
No MCP, marketplace, remote publish/search/update, or lifecycle runtime behavior changed.
